hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'git commit' || exit 0; CDPATH=$(echo "$CMD" | grep -oE 'cd [^ ]+' | head -1 | awk '{print $2}'); GCPATH=$(echo "$CMD" | grep -oE 'git -C [^ ]+' | head -1 | awk '{print $3}'); TARGET=${CDPATH:-$GCPATH}; if [ -n "$TARGET" ] && [ -d "$TARGET" ]; then REPO=$(git -C "$TARGET" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); else REPO=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); fi; [ -z "$REPO" ] && exit 0; HURL_DIR="$REPO/backend/tests/hurl"; FAILED=0; if [ -n "$(find "$HURL_DIR" -name '*.hurl' 2>/dev/null)" ]; then if curl -sf http://localhost:8000/docs > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo '▶ Hurl 테스트 실행 중...'; if hurl --test "$HURL_DIR"/*.hurl --variable base_url=http://localhost:8000 2>&1 | tail -5; then echo '✓ Hurl 통과'; else echo '✗ Hurl 실패'; FAILED=1; fi; else echo '⚠ 백엔드 미실행 → Hurl 건너뜀'; fi; fi; E2E_DIR="$REPO/frontend/e2e"; if [ -n "$(find "$E2E_DIR" -name '*.spec.ts' 2>/dev/null)" ]; then FRONTEND_NM="$REPO/frontend/node_modules"; GIT_COMMON=$(git -C "$REPO" rev-parse --git-common-dir 2>/dev/null || echo ''); MAIN_REPO=$(dirname "$GIT_COMMON" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if [ ! -d "$FRONTEND_NM" ] && [ -d "$MAIN_REPO/frontend/node_modules" ]; then ln -sf "$MAIN_REPO/frontend/node_modules" "$FRONTEND_NM"; fi; echo '▶ Playwright 테스트 실행 중...'; if (cd "$REPO/frontend" && npx playwright test --reporter=line 2>&1 | tail -10); then echo '✓ Playwright 통과'; else echo '✗ Playwright 실패'; FAILED=1; fi; fi; [ "$FAILED" -eq 1 ] && exit 2; exit 0
